title: Vändkorset
writer: Elin Wägner, Ragnar Hyltén-Cavallius, Bengt Janzon
actors: Lauritz Falk, Marianne Aminoff, Irma Christenson
plot: The small town of Gåtatorp in Småland is entirely dependent on its prominent furniture factory. But the factory is in danger because the weak economy means that the bank wants to shut down the factory.
